name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1546.012 - SilentProcessExit Monitoring Abuse (Sysmon)
description: Detects reg.exe modifying SilentProcessExit keys for persistence via IFEO sub-key. Sysmon EID 1 process creation. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.Image: *\\reg.exe AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*SilentProcessExit* AND (*MonitorProcess* OR *ReportingMode* OR *GlobalFlag*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1546.012 - IFEO Debugger Backdoor on Accessibility Tools (Sysmon)
description: Detects setting Debugger value under IFEO for accessibility binaries (sethc, utilman, osk, narrator, magnify) via reg.exe. Sysmon EID 1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.Image: *\\reg.exe AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*Image?File?Execution?Options* AND *Debugger* AND (*sethc* OR *utilman* OR *osk* OR *narrator* OR *magnify* OR *DisplaySwitch* OR *AtBroker*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1574.014 - AppDomainManager DLL Hijacking (Sysmon)
description: Detects .NET AppDomainManager injection via APPDOMAIN_MANAGER_ASM/TYPE env vars or DomainManager.dll copy. Sysmon EID 1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*APPDOMAIN_MANAGER_ASM* OR *APPDOMAIN_MANAGER_TYPE* OR (*copy* AND *DomainManager* AND *system32*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1546.015 - Recycle Bin CLSID Shell Command Persistence (Sysmon)
description: Detects modification of Recycle Bin COM CLSID shell\open\command via reg.exe. Sysmon EID 1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*645FF040-5081-101B-9F08-00AA002F954E* AND *shell* AND *command*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1106 - CoffLoader Beacon Object File Execution (Sysmon)
description: Detects CoffLoader executing .bof files for in-process post-exploitation. Sysmon EID 1. Observed loading adcs_enum.bof in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND (winlog.event_data.Image: (*\\coffloader.exe OR *\\coffloader64.exe OR *\\COFFLoader.exe) OR (winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*.bof* AND *go*)))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1543.003 - Service Creation with Command Shell Binpath (Sysmon)
description: Detects sc.exe creating services with cmd/powershell/mshta as binpath. Sysmon EID 1. Observed creating evilsvc in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.Image: *\\sc.exe AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*create* AND (*binpath*cmd* OR *binpath*powershell* OR *binpath*mshta* OR *binpath*wscript* OR *binpath*cscript* OR *binpath*rundll32*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1056.001 - Keylogger Tool Execution (Sysmon)
description: Detects WiretapKey, GetAsyncKeyState-based keyloggers from staging paths. Sysmon EID 1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND (winlog.event_data.Image: (*\\WiretapKey.exe OR *\\getasynckeystate.exe OR *\\KeyLogger.exe) OR (winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*capture_keystrokes* OR *keylog*) AND winlog.event_data.Image: (*\\Temp\\* OR *\\Public\\* OR *\\Downloads\\*)))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1036.005 - Masqueraded AdFind as sqlceip.exe (Sysmon)
description: Detects AdFind.exe renamed to sqlceip.exe running AD queries. Uses Sysmon OriginalFileName field for masquerade detection. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND ((winlog.event_data.Image: *\\sqlceip.exe AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*objectcategory* OR *-f* OR *-gcb* OR *-sc*)) OR (winlog.event_data.OriginalFileName: AdFind.exe AND NOT winlog.event_data.Image: *\\adfind.exe))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1564.001 - SharpHide Hidden Registry Run Key (Sysmon)
description: Detects SharpHide.exe that creates hidden Run keys with null-byte prefixed values. Sysmon EID 1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND (winlog.event_data.Image: (*\\SharpHide.exe OR *\\sharphide.exe) OR winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*SharpHide* OR *sharphide*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1053.005 - Scheduled Task with Masqueraded Name (Sysmon)
description: Detects schtasks creating tasks with Chrome/Google masquerade names in staging paths or PowerShell bypass from Temp. Sysmon EID 1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.Image: *\\schtasks.exe AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: *create* AND (winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*AppData*Roaming*Chrome* OR *AppData*Roaming*Gchrome* OR *AppData*Roaming*Google* OR *Users*Public*Publ*) OR (winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*powershell* AND *-ep?bypass* AND *Temp*)))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1564.004 - Alternate Data Stream Payload Execution (Sysmon)
description: Detects ADS creation via type redirection and execution of payloads from NTFS ADS. Sysmon EID 1. Observed with ServiceADS:cachetask in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*type* AND *>* AND *:*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1574.002 - System Binary Copied to Temp for DLL Sideloading (Sysmon)
description: Detects copy of system binaries (dism.exe, stordiag.exe, wsmprovhost.exe, etc.) to staging paths for DLL sideloading. Sysmon EID 1. Observed with 12+ sideload chains in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*copy* AND (*\\dism.exe* OR *\\stordiag.exe* OR *\\wsmprovhost.exe* OR *\\deviceeject.exe* OR *\\wmpnetwk.exe* OR *\\imagingdevices.exe* OR *\\OneDriveUpdater.exe* OR *\\msbuild.exe*) AND (*\\Temp* OR *\\Public* OR *\\Downloads* OR *\\ProgramData* OR *\\AppData*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1562.006 - ETW Patching Tools Execution (Sysmon)
description: Detects ETW patching tools (TamperETW, patch_etw_rust, Etwunhook, SnD_AMSI) and COMPlus_ETWEnabled=0 disable. Sysmon EID 1. Observed with 5 ETW bypass implementations in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND (winlog.event_data.Image: (*\\TamperETW.exe OR *\\patch_etw_rust.exe OR *\\Etwunhook.exe OR *\\SnD_AMSI.exe) OR winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*COMPlus_ETWEnabled=0* OR *EtwEventWrite* OR *NtTraceEvent* OR *EtwNotificationRegister*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1123 - Audio Capture Tool Execution (Sysmon)
description: Detects microphone capture tools from staging paths. Sysmon EID 1. Observed CustomMicRecorder.exe and audio.exe in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND (winlog.event_data.Image: (*\\CustomMicRecorder.exe OR *\\MicRecorder.exe OR *\\AudioCapture.exe) OR (winlog.event_data.Image: *\\audio.exe AND winlog.event_data.Image: (*\\Temp\\* OR *\\Public\\* OR *\\AppData\\* OR *\\ProgramData\\*)))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1021.003 - DCOM Lateral Movement Tools (Sysmon)
description: Detects CheeseDCOM, CsDCOM tools abusing MMC20.Application, ShellWindows for remote exec. Sysmon EID 1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND (winlog.event_data.Image: (*\\CheeseDCOM.exe OR *\\CsDCOM.exe OR *\\dcomexec.exe) OR winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*MMC20Application* OR *ShellWindows* OR *ShellBrowserWindow* OR *ExcelDDE*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1547.001 - BootExecute Registry Modification (Sysmon)
description: Detects modification of BootExecute under Session Manager via reg.exe. Sysmon EID 1. Observed appending calc.exe in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.Image: *\\reg.exe AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*BootExecute* AND *Session?Manager*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1003 - WDigest UseLogonCredential Enable (Sysmon)
description: Detects enabling WDigest UseLogonCredential=1 for plaintext password storage in LSASS. Sysmon EID 1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*WDigest* AND *UseLogonCredential* AND */d?1*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1546.015 - COM InprocServer32 Hijacking (Sysmon)
description: Detects reg.exe modifying CLSID InprocServer32 to point to DLLs in staging paths. Sysmon EID 1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.Image: *\\reg.exe AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*CLSID* AND *InprocServer32* AND (*\\Temp\\* OR *\\AppData\\* OR *\\Public\\* OR *\\ProgramData\\* OR *\\Downloads\\*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1543.003 - Service DLL Registry Persistence (Sysmon)
description: Detects reg.exe setting ServiceDll or registering SvcHost service groups. Sysmon EID 1. Observed with MPSEvtMan, StorSyncSvc in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.Image: *\\reg.exe AND ((winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*Services* AND *Parameters* AND *ServiceDll*)) OR (winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*SvcHost* AND *REG_MULTI_SZ*)))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1562.004 - Firewall Rule Blocking EDR Outbound (Sysmon)
description: Detects firewall rules blocking MsMpEng/MsSense/SenseCncProxy outbound. Sysmon EID 1. Observed with 3 blocking rules in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*New-NetFirewallRule* OR *netsh*) AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*MsMpEng* OR *MsSense* OR *SenseCncProxy* OR *WinDefend* OR *Windows?Defender*) AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*Block* OR *block*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1106 - API Callback Shellcode Execution Tools (Sysmon)
description: Detects 21+ tools abusing Windows API callbacks for shellcode execution. Sysmon EID 1. 45 unique tools observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND (winlog.event_data.Image: (*\\EnumWindows.exe OR *\\EnumFontFamiliesExW.exe OR *\\CertEnumSystemStoreLocation.exe OR *\\CryptEnumOIDInfo.exe OR *\\CreateThreadPoolWait.exe OR *\\FlsAlloc.exe OR *\\EnumSystemGeoID.exe OR *\\EnumTimeFormatsEx.exe OR *\\EnumUILanguagesW.exe OR *\\ENUMSYSTEMCODEPAGESW.exe OR *\\InitOnceExecuteOnce.exe OR *\\ImmEnumInputContext.exe OR *\\SymFindFileInPath.exe OR *\\VerifierEnumerateResource.exe OR *\\AppRecoveryCallback.exe OR *\\FunctionCallback.exe OR *\\ListPlanting.exe OR *\\WindfarmDynamite.exe OR *\\ExceptionOrientedProg.exe OR *\\ShellcodeCopyWithMailslot.exe OR *\\ShellcodeCopyWithPipe.exe) OR winlog.event_data.Image: *\\CBT_*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1490 - Ransomware Pre-Encryption Chain (Sysmon)
description: Detects wbadmin delete catalog/backup, bcdedit recovery disable, Conti -shadowops flag, VOLSNAP IOCTL tool. Sysmon EID 1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND ((winlog.event_data.Image: *\\wbadmin.exe AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*delete?catalog* OR *delete?backup* OR *delete?systemstatebackup*)) OR (winlog.event_data.Image: *\\bcdedit.exe AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*recoveryenabled?no* OR *bootstatuspolicy?ignoreallfailures*)) OR winlog.event_data.CommandLine: *-shadowops* OR winlog.event_data.Image: *\\IOCTL_VOLSNAP_SET_MAX_DIFF_AREA_SIZE.exe)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1546 - Event Log Payload Persistence SharpEventPersist (Sysmon)
description: Detects SharpEventPersist/SharpEventLoader tools for fileless event log shellcode persistence. Sysmon EID 1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "1" AND (winlog.event_data.Image: (*\\SharpEventPersist.exe OR *\\SharpEventLoader.exe) OR winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*SharpEventPersist* OR *SharpEventLoader*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1546.012 - SilentProcessExit Registry Set Value (Sysmon EID 13)
description: Detects direct registry value set for SilentProcessExit MonitorProcess/ReportingMode/GlobalFlag via Sysmon Registry SetValue events. Does not require command-line visibility. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "13" AND winlog.event_data.TargetObject: (*SilentProcessExit* AND (*MonitorProcess* OR *ReportingMode* OR *GlobalFlag*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1546.012 - IFEO Debugger Registry Set for Accessibility Tools (Sysmon EID 13)
description: Detects Debugger value being set under IFEO for accessibility tools via Sysmon registry events. Catches modifications regardless of the tool used (reg.exe, PowerShell, API). Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "13" AND winlog.event_data.TargetObject: (*Image?File?Execution?Options* AND *Debugger*) AND winlog.event_data.TargetObject: (*sethc* OR *utilman* OR *osk* OR *narrator* OR *magnify* OR *DisplaySwitch* OR *AtBroker*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1003 - WDigest UseLogonCredential Registry Set (Sysmon EID 13)
description: Detects UseLogonCredential being set to 1 under WDigest via Sysmon registry events. Catches modifications from any tool including PowerShell Set-ItemProperty. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "13" AND winlog.event_data.TargetObject: (*WDigest* AND *UseLogonCredential*) AND winlog.event_data.Details: (*DWORD*0x00000001* OR *1*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1547.001 - BootExecute Registry Modification (Sysmon EID 13)
description: Detects modification of BootExecute registry value via Sysmon registry events. Default value is 'autocheck autochk *' - any additional entries are suspicious. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "13" AND winlog.event_data.TargetObject: (*Session?Manager* AND *BootExecute*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1546.015 - COM InprocServer32 Hijack to Staging Path (Sysmon EID 13)
description: Detects CLSID InprocServer32 registry values pointing to DLLs in user-writable staging paths. Sysmon EID 13. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "13" AND winlog.event_data.TargetObject: (*CLSID* AND *InprocServer32*) AND winlog.event_data.Details: (*\\Temp\\* OR *\\AppData\\* OR *\\Public\\* OR *\\ProgramData\\* OR *\\Downloads\\*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1543.003 - ServiceDll Registry Persistence (Sysmon EID 13)
description: Detects ServiceDll values being set under service Parameters keys via Sysmon registry events. Catches DLL service persistence regardless of registration method. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "13" AND winlog.event_data.TargetObject: (*Services* AND *Parameters* AND *ServiceDll*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1546.015 - Recycle Bin CLSID Registry Hijack (Sysmon EID 13)
description: Detects modification of the Recycle Bin COM CLSID shell command via Sysmon registry SetValue events. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "13" AND winlog.event_data.TargetObject: (*645FF040-5081-101B-9F08-00AA002F954E* AND *shell* AND *command*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1564.004 - Alternate Data Stream Created (Sysmon EID 15)
description: Detects creation of NTFS Alternate Data Streams via Sysmon FileCreateStreamHash events. ADS are used to hide payloads that are invisible to dir and Explorer. Observed with ServiceADS:cachetask in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "15" AND NOT winlog.event_data.TargetFilename: (*Zone.Identifier* OR *:$DATA*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1562.001 - PowerShell AMSI Bypass via Script Block (EID 4104)
description: Detects AMSI bypass attempts in PowerShell script blocks including amsiInitFailed, AmsiUtils, amsiContext patching. Not visible to EDR-only deployments. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "4104" AND winlog.event_data.ScriptBlockText: (*amsiInitFailed* OR *AmsiUtils* OR *amsiContext* OR *SetValue*amsiSession* OR *Reflection.Assembly*AMSI*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1562.006 - PowerShell ETW Disable via Script Block (EID 4104)
description: Detects ETW disabling in PowerShell including COMPlus_ETWEnabled, EtwEventWrite patching, and Reflection-based ETW tampering. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "4104" AND winlog.event_data.ScriptBlockText: (*COMPlus_ETWEnabled* OR *EtwEventWrite* OR *NtTraceEvent* OR *Reflection*ntdll*Etw*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1003 - PowerShell Credential Dumping Commands (EID 4104)
description: Detects PowerShell script blocks containing credential theft commands: sekurlsa, WDigest UseLogonCredential, SAM hive dump, DCSync. Captures attacks invisible to process-only monitoring. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "4104" AND winlog.event_data.ScriptBlockText: (*sekurlsa* OR *UseLogonCredential* OR (*SAM* AND *save*) OR *DumpCreds* OR *Invoke-Mimikatz* OR *DCSync* OR *lsadump*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1059.001 - PowerShell Download Cradle Patterns (EID 4104)
description: Detects PowerShell download cradle patterns in script blocks: DownloadString, DownloadFile, Invoke-WebRequest piped to IEX, Net.WebClient, bitstransfer. Captures staged payload delivery. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "4104" AND winlog.event_data.ScriptBlockText: ((*DownloadString* OR *DownloadFile* OR *Invoke-WebRequest* OR *wget* OR *curl* OR *Net.WebClient* OR *bitstransfer*) AND (*IEX* OR *Invoke-Expression* OR *Start-Process* OR *iex* OR *-enc* OR *FromBase64*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1562.004 - PowerShell Firewall Block Security Products (EID 4104)
description: Detects New-NetFirewallRule in script blocks blocking Defender/ATP processes. Catches the full PowerShell command including parameters not visible in process cmdline truncation. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "4104" AND winlog.event_data.ScriptBlockText: (*New-NetFirewallRule* AND (*MsMpEng* OR *MsSense* OR *SenseCncProxy* OR *WinDefend*) AND (*Block* OR *Deny*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1204 - Suspicious Process Execution from Temp (Security EID 4688)
description: Detects execution of known offensive tools from Temp/Public paths via Windows Security process creation audit. Works WITHOUT Sysmon. Requires command line auditing (GPO). Covers Picus simulation 2026-04-12 tool names.
query: winlog.event_id: "4688" AND winlog.event_data.NewProcessName: (*\\Temp\\* OR *\\Public\\*) AND (winlog.event_data.NewProcessName: (*mimikatz* OR *lazagne* OR *rubeus* OR *SharpHide* OR *CoffLoader* OR *TamperETW* OR *SharpEventPersist* OR *SharpEventLoader* OR *CheeseDCOM* OR *WiretapKey* OR *CustomMicRecorder*) OR winlog.event_data.CommandLine: (*sekurlsa* OR *SharpHide* OR *-shadowops* OR *SharpEventPersist*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1547.001 - Critical Registry Key Modification (Security EID 4657)
description: Detects modification of high-value registry keys via Windows Security audit. Requires Object Access auditing enabled on IFEO, Run keys, BootExecute, and Services. Works WITHOUT Sysmon. Covers persistence techniques from Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "4657" AND (winlog.event_data.ObjectName: (*SilentProcessExit* OR *Image?File?Execution?Options*Debugger* OR *BootExecute* OR *CurrentVersion\\Run* OR *ServiceDll*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1562.004 - Windows Firewall Rule Added (Firewall EID 2004)
description: Detects firewall rule additions via Windows Firewall with Advanced Security event log. Works without Sysmon or EDR. Complements process-based detections by catching rules added via any method. Observed 3 blocking rules in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "2004" AND winlog.event_data.ApplicationPath: (*MsMpEng* OR *MsSense* OR *SenseCncProxy*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1543.003 - Suspicious Service Installed (System EID 7045)
description: Detects new service installation events from the System event log where the service binary references cmd.exe, powershell, or staging paths. No Sysmon or EDR required. Covers malicious service persistence from Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "7045" AND (winlog.event_data.ImagePath: (*cmd* OR *powershell* OR *mshta* OR *wscript* OR *cscript* OR *rundll32* OR *\\Temp\\* OR *\\Public\\* OR *\\AppData\\*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12 | Winlogbeat] T1053.005 - Suspicious Scheduled Task Created (Security EID 4698)
description: Detects creation of scheduled tasks via Security audit log where the task XML references PowerShell bypass, staging paths, or masqueraded names. No Sysmon required. Observed masqueraded Chrome tasks in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: winlog.event_id: "4698" AND winlog.event_data.TaskContent: (*powershell* OR *-ep?bypass* OR *\\Temp\\* OR *\\Public\\* OR *AppData*Roaming*Chrome* OR *AppData*Roaming*Google*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12
